@rendley/sdk - v1.9.0
  • @rendley/sdk
  • Pixi
  • IRenderingContext

Interface IRenderingContext

Mixed WebGL1 / WebGL2 rendering context. Either it's WebGL2, either it's WebGL1 with PixiJS polyfills on it.

Memberof

PIXI
